channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: The Strokes highlight destroyed Gaza and Iran universities at Coachella
item.description: US band The Strokes used their Coachella set to showcase the US-Israeli destruction of universities in Gaza and Iran.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 52 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: Islamabad talks in limbo as Iran says it will retaliate after US marines capture an Iranian ship near Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran says no talks with US for now, casting doubt over Pakistan efforts
item.description: Iran has said it will not be sending negotiators to Pakistan for talks with the US, amid rising tensions.

item.title: US military releases video of marines seizing Iranian ship
item.description: Video from the US military show an operation by its forces to seize an Iranian-flagged ship near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: To stay or to go? No good options for Lebanon’s displaced
item.description: Residents of southern Lebanon face a stark choice: stay home and risk being killed, or flee and risk deepening poverty.

item.title: Oil prices surge amid mixed signals on US-Iran peace talks
item.description: Brent crude rises more than 7 percent as Washington and Tehran offer conflicting accounts on ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran will skip talks as tensions rise over US ship seizure
item.description: Attack comes hours after US President Donald Trump announced he is sending his team to Islamabad for possible talks.

item.title: US forces attack and seize Iranian ship Touska near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US Central Command has published a video said to show a guided-missile destroyer firing at an Iranian-flagged ship.

item.title: Argentina’s Milei backs US-Israel war on Iran in Jerusalem visit
item.description: Argentina’s president reaffirmed alignment with the US and Israel during a visit to Jerusalem, backing their war on Iran

item.title: Protesters defy Berlin rain to call for end to global wars
item.description: Hundreds protested in Berlin against the US-Israeli aggression on Iran, and Israeli attacks on Gaza and Lebanon.
